data.acceptance:
1. `thimble web` prints, before the URL line, a 3-line block: ``` Thimble web is a SINGLE-OPERATOR LOCAL TOOL. For shared/production workflows, use the CLI. Token rotates every 15m; press Ctrl+C to stop. ```
2. The first page of the UI shows the same banner in muted styling (it's already half-there with the "values stay redacted" pill — extend it).
